calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Joe Jedeikin, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:20am
Cause called for small claims appeals. Appearing Kenneth A. Lipson appearing for Appellant Rebeca Hernandez; Nandine Zeltzer, Pro Per, appearing for Respondent.
Judge Jedeikin informs parties that he will hear arguments and reserve ruling on the Appellant's 9-17-07 motion to dismiss respodent's action pursuant to CCP389(B).
Ms. Zeltzer presents her argument in the narrative. Mr. Lipson responds and answers questions from Judge Jedeikin.
EXH1 Respondent's trial brief
EXH2 Respondent's reply to Appellant's brief
Mr. Lipson cross-examines Ms. Zeltzer. Ms. Zeltzer objects to Mr. Lipson's request to view her file. The Court rules he can not review the file.
9:55am
Mr. Lipson argues appellant's position and begins direct examination of Ms. Hernandez
EXHA Letter from Ms. Zeltzer to Ms. Hernandez re costs of law suits dated 4/3/05
10:08am
Cross-examination by Ms. Zeltzer.
10:10am
Matter is submitted and Appellant's motion to dismiss is submitted. Evidence is admitted and retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Continued To Sep-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
